scripts.ci:check: pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm test
scripts.dx:check: pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm test && pnpm security:audit
scripts.dx:deps: echo '📦 Checking for outdated dependencies...' && pnpm outdated && echo '🔍 Running security audit...' && pnpm audit --audit-level=moderate
scripts.dx:setup: echo '🔧 Verifying development environment...' && pnpm env:validate && pnpm check-deps && echo '✅ Development environment verified'
scripts.dx:all: echo '🚀 Running comprehensive DX checks...' && pnpm dx:setup && pnpm dx:check && pnpm dx:deps && echo '✅ All DX checks passed'
scripts.dx:pr: echo '📋 Preparing PR...' && pnpm dx:check && echo '✅ Ready for PR submission'
scripts.dx:help:
echo '
📦 DX Scripts Available:
  dx:quick     - Fast feedback: typecheck + lint only
  dx:check     - Full checks: typecheck + lint + test + security audit
  dx:fix       - Auto-fix lint and format issues
  dx:deps      - Check outdated dependencies and run audit
  dx:unused    - Detect unused dependencies
  dx:setup     - Verify development environment
  dx:all       - Run all DX checks comprehensively
  dx:ci        - Simulate CI: dx:check + build
  dx:pr        - Prepare for PR: dx:check + ready confirmation

💡 Recommended workflow:
  - Before pushing: pnpm dx:quick
  - Before PR: pnpm dx:pr
  - First setup: pnpm dx:setup
'
scripts.env:verify: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const {execSync}=require('child_process');let pnpmVersion;try{pnpmVersion=execSync('pnpm --version',{encoding:'utf8'}).trim()}catch(e){console.error('❌ pnpm is not installed.');console.log('\\n📦 Install pnpm:');console.log('  - macOS/Linux: curl -fsSL https://get.pnpm.io/install.sh | sh -');console.log('  - Windows: npm install -g pnpm');console.log('  - Or via Corepack (Node 16+): corepack enable && corepack prepare pnpm@latest --activate');console.log('\\n📋 Required version: pnpm 10.28.2');console.log('   See .nvmrc for recommended Node version.');process.exit(1)}const pnpmMajor=parseInt(pnpmVersion.split('.')[0]);if(pnpmMajor<10){console.error('❌ pnpm version '+pnpmVersion+' is too old. Required: pnpm 10.x');console.log('📦 Update pnpm: pnpm update -g pnpm');process.exit(1)}console.log('✅ pnpm '+pnpmVersion+' verified');const envExample=fs.existsSync('.env.example');const envLocal=fs.existsSync('.env.local');if(!envExample){console.error('❌ .env.example not found');process.exit(1)}if(!envLocal){console.warn('⚠️  .env.local not found. Copy .env.example to .env.local and configure your environment variables.');console.log('  Run: cp .env.example .env.local')}else{console.log('✅ Environment files verified')}"
